{{Infobox character
| name = Jorin Curse-breaker
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
| name = Jorin Curse-breaker
| aliases = Jorin, Jorin Maze-walker
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Curse-breaker, Maze-walker, Regent of the South, legendary Reader, Regent, legendary founder of the Empire
| abilities = Intent, alchemy, paper wings decorated with Windwatcher feathers
| affiliations = Consultants, Imperial Guard
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Jorin Curse-breaker Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin, known by the titles [[Curse-breaker]] and Maze-walker, is a legendary figure in [[Imperial]] history and currently serves as the [[Regent of the South]]. A contemporary and rumored companion of [[the Emperor]], he is credited with significantly advancing the study of [[Reading]], linguistics, cartography, and exploration. He established the modern classification system for curses and malicious [[Intent]], and his philosophical contributions were foundational to the creation of the [[Magister]]’s [[Guild]]. As an architect and innovator, Jorin designed the original prototype for the [[Imperial]] Prison on [[Gray Island]], a complex subterranean [[labyrinth]] filled with alchemical traps and false passages. He also created specialized tools for managing dangerous forces, such as a stone box designed to siphon energy from powerful curses and [[Elder artifacts]]. In combat, Jorin is a formidable force whose power is described as a corrosive, tide-like [[Intent]] that can dissolve matter into ash. He wields a unique, black-bladed [[sword]] that is kept wrapped in bandages to contain its volatile and murderous nature. Despite his immense capabilities, he often appears as a disheveled figure wearing ragged clothing, numerous knickknacks, and signature black-tinted spectacles called "shadeglasses." He has been known to protect the Capital from [[Great Elders]], using his specialized weaponry and even wood-and-paper wings to engage in aerial combat.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Jorin was known as the [[Curse-breaker]] and the Maze-walker.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Jorin Maze-walker is a legendary Reader who spent years [[investing]] a bottle of water.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jorin Curse-breaker]] is the [[Regent of the South]] who took over after [[the Emperor]]'s death.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jorin Curse-breaker]] built the original system of prisons under the island.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Over a millennium ago, Jorin Maze-walker established the foundations of a [[labyrinth]] that eventually wove through [[Gray Island]]. During his time, he designed a specialized stone box intended to draw power from [[Elder artifacts]] and break curses. Although Jorin left behind a seal, it was ultimately overpowered by the Heart. He maintains the belief that [[Soulbound Vessels]] possess their own consciousness and is known to carry a cloth-wrapped, full-sized [[sword]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Jorin Maze-walker laid the foundations of the [[labyrinth]] over a thousand years ago.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Jorin Maze-walker designed a stone box to break curses and draw power from [[Elder artifacts]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Jorin Curse-breaker]] constructed a [[labyrinth]] that weaves through [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Jorin left a seal that the Heart overpowered.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Jorin Curse-breaker]] believes [[Soulbound Vessels]] have their own consciousness.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Jorin Curse-breaker]] carries a full-sized [[sword]] wrapped in cloth.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|As one of [[the Emperor]]'s original companions, [[Regent]] Jorin Maze-walker, who is known for wearing dark-tinted glasses, may have been assassinated while staying with the [[Consultants]]. Because he is a target for elimination to win the fight, Jorin faces a vicious assault characterized by his overwhelming power. In response to this threat, [[Calder]] decides to take his chances against him.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Jorin may have also been assassinated and was staying with the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Jorin is a target for elimination to win the fight.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Jorin is one of [[the Emperor]]'s original companions.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Jorin's assault is described as vicious and his power overwhelming.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Jorin Maze-walker wears dark-tinted glasses.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Jorin Maze-walker is a [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] decides to take his chances against Jorin.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22" />}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A legendary founder of the Empire and one of [[the Emperor]]'s three surviving companions, Jorin [[Curse-breaker]] carries a cloth-wrapped [[sword]] upon his back. He is highly knowledgeable regarding cursed [[Vessels]] and developed the classification system for malicious [[Intent]], even proposing a method to share knowledge by merging the [[Intent]] of multiple individuals. Throughout his history, he has utilized acids and alchemical explosives to carve walls and once fashioned a rough-cut stone box centuries ago to siphon energy from powerful curses. After [[the Emperor]] began using his imperial title, Jorin joined the group and eventually found himself on the [[Gray Island]], where he can be seen smoking a pipe.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Jorin Curse-breaker]] is a legendary founder of the Empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Talking to Jorin Maze-walker is compared to talking with [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Jorin has a cloth-wrapped [[sword]] strapped to his back.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Jorin is one of [[the Emperor]]'s three surviving companions.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Jorin created the classification system for curses and malicious [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Jorin Maze-walker used acids and alchemical explosives to carve a wall.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Jorin was attacked.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Jorin proposed a method of sharing knowledge by merging the [[Intent]] of two or more individuals.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Jorin invested bandages for [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Jorin joined the group after [[the Emperor]] began calling himself [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Jorin Curse-breaker]] is knowledgeable about cursed [[Vessels]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Jorin Curse-breaker]] hewed a rough-cut stone box centuries ago to siphon energy away from powerful curses.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Jorin Curse-breaker]] is on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Jorin is a character who smokes a pipe.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|As the [[Regent of the South]], Jorin Maze-breaker is a member of the current administration who is set to step down from rule as part of [[Estyr]]'s deal. After meeting [[the Emperor]] briefly on the [[Gray Island]] and covering a retreat for escaping [[Consultants]], he was tasked with receiving a crown for secure burial. [[Calder]] identified Jorin as a potentially dangerous opponent and a possible source of solutions while absorbing information through the [[Optasia]], eventually sending [[Emeralda]] with a sealed letter intended for him. Following a shift in loyalty from the [[Imperial Guard]], Jorin ordered the evacuation of the Capital's citizens and was seen floating on paper wings decorated with [[Windwatcher feathers]]. While waiting in the [[Emperor's throne]] room, the silvery-eyed [[Regent]] wore shadeglasses and wielded a nameless [[sword]] that devours curses, though he was eventually weakened and unarmed after striking [[Jarelys Teach]] with [[Intent]]. Later, while at the helm of a ship, he fought a host of floating swords and emitted waves of dark energy.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The crown]] was to be shipped to Jorin for burial with security.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jorin is one of the individuals who will step down from rule as part of [[Estyr]]'s deal.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jorin Maze-walker is the [[Regent of the South]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Emperor met Jorin briefly on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jorin covered the retreat of the escaping [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jorin Curse-breaker]] is an individual who could potentially intervene in medical matters.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jorin is an opponent [[Calder]] believes they cannot beat without risk.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jorin is one of the names [[Calder]] finds while absorbing information through the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] needs to get a message to Jorin.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Emeralda]] is carrying a sealed letter intended for [[Jorin Curse-breaker]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jorin Curse-breaker]] is someone [[Calder]] might speak with to find a solution.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial Guard]] transferred their loyalty to Jorin.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jorin ordered an evacuation of the Capital's citizens.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jorin is a [[Regent]] who serves the current administration.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jorin Curse-breaker]] is the [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jorin Curse-breaker]] uses paper wings decorated with [[Windwatcher feathers]] to float.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jorin Curse-breaker]]'s eyes are silvery pale.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jorin wields a nameless [[sword]] that devours curses.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jorin struck [[Jarelys Teach]] with [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jorin is weakened and unarmed.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jorin is waiting in the [[Emperor's throne]] room.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jorin wears shadeglasses.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jorin Maze-walker is a target of a potential protest by [[Cheska Bennett]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jorin is at the helm of a ship and holds a sheathed [[sword]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jorin is fought by a host of swords floating in the air.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jorin emits waves of dark energy.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin Maze-walker, also known as Jorin [[Curse-breaker]], is a powerful Reader and [[Regent]] who once believed that books could save everyone. After hiring a [[Navigator]] ship under a false name to explore the deep [[Aion]], he eventually arrived at the Capital with a team as an ally to [[Shera]]. During the chaos at [[the Emperor]]'s Stage, Jorin ended the battle and later acted as [[the Emperor]] while suggesting that [[Estyr Six]] was in decline. Utilizing a mobile alchemist laboratory and an [[Intent]] focused on peak efficiency, he engaged the [[Great Elder]] in combat throughout the city using a bandage-wrapped [[sword]] that emitted a corrosive aura. Ultimately, his power drowned the [[Great Elder]] in acidic darkness, and he was later represented by a bronze effigy depicting his signature hat, glasses, and [[sword]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin has hired a [[Navigator]] ship under a false name to explore the deep [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin is a wise man who believed books would save everyone.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin is someone [[the Emperor]] suggests standing with him.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin was beaten with his own [[sword]] by [[Jarelys Teach]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Champion]]'s blindfold was similar to Jorin's disguise.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin is disguised and carries a [[sword]] wrapped in bandages in a cello case.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin is a character who uses a blade to ward off the [[Blackwatch Guild Head]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jorin Curse-breaker]] is a character who might know how to restore [[Estyr]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jorin's sword]] causes stone to melt and run away in black rivulets.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin's [[Intent]] focuses on alchemy to sustain him at peak efficiency and keeping the loop closed to outside influence.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin is staring at [[Estyr]]'s face.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin spoke of governing only in horrified tones.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin built the island.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin has set up a mobile alchemist laboratory.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin is one of the most powerful [[Readers]] in history.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin is waiting among the crowd below with [[Shera]]'s backup.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin is an ally of [[Shera]] who brought a team into the Capital.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] intended to rejoin Jorin.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] had told Jorin that [[Syphren's power]] did not make her stronger or faster.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin arrived to rampaging inside [[the Emperor]]'s Stage looking for [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin arrived at the [[Emperor’s Stage]] and ended the battle.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin's full name is Jorin Maze-walker.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin is known as [[Jorin Curse-breaker]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin is a character present during the conversation.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin is acting as [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin suggested that [[Estyr Six]] was on the decline.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin is a [[Regent]] who leveled a building three streets north.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin carries a bandage-wrapped [[sword]] and wears a wide-brimmed hat.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin uses [[Intent]] that can cause people to stumble.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin has silver eyes.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A voice in the wind addresses Jorin regarding his torment.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin is a [[Regent]] with [[Intent]] in his blade.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin flitted all over the city trading blows with the [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin struck against the [[Great Elder]] using his blade.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin possesses a silver mirror and a bottle of star-like liquid.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin's blade was surrounded by a corrosive aura.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin wears a jacket with many pockets, shadeglasses, and a wide-brimmed hat.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin's power was stirring.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin stayed on the [[Consultant]] ship, [[Bastion]]’s [[Shadow]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin is represented by a bronze effigy with a [[sword]], hat, and glasses.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin's power drowns the [[Great Elder]] in acidic darkness.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Jorin wears a loose white robe.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c27">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“I don’t see us beating Jorin without rolling the dice.”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“Help me out, we need to get a message to Jorin.”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“Jorin…such torment you still suffer. I will free you.”<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Readers]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
